CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/LEONARD MASTRO- MONACO AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1515 SUTTER ST, #245, S.F, CA. - $1,079.05 RENT & DAMAGES - $325 ATTY FEES - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 5-23-94 - IF DEF. DOES VACATE AS AGREED, PL. WILL RETURN $300 SEC. DEP. WITHOUT INTEREST & WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1515 SUTTER ST, #245, S.F, CA. $1,079.05 RENT, $325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,404.05, STAYED UNTIL MAY-23-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. VACATES BY 5-23-94 5PM, NO PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES, & NO DAMAGE TO PREMISES, PL. WILL RETURN $300 SEC. DEP, VACATE JUDGMENT & DISM. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
